document: Labor shortages and agricultural trucking rates

goal: establish the linkage between trucker supply and the demand for trucking services
reason: rising truck rates is a signal of a broader shortage of truckers
status: has yet to be established empirically
strategy: combining US Bureau of Census Current Population Survey data on truck driver wages with USDA‐Agricultural Marketing Service Service data on truck rates
